administering potion an
A small cloth bag that can hold up to 20 pounds of material.
A simple woven basket that can hold 6 cubic feet of material or objects.
This stoppered bottle can hold up to one quart of a liquid, such as water or oil.
A simple leather bucket to carry water or other liquids.
This elegant flask holds a generous portion of your favorite drink. It is often used by nobles and adventurers alike.

A sturdy clay jug from the Underdark, capable of holding 1 gallon (4 liters) of water or similar liquids. It is enchanted to detect the presence of magic within a 30-foot radius, turning a murky brown when magic is near.
A leather tunic that grants advantage on Dexterity saving throws made to avoid being knocked prone.
